minecraft:written_book_content.author: Rafiq
pages: {"text":"Bought 12 pieces of leather, sold 9. Paid two emeralds in shade money to keep the awning up."}
{"text":"Water price doubled at noon. A caravan from the south brought dates and cracked pottery. The pottery still sold."}

minecraft:written_book_content.author: Minaq
pages: {"text":"Traded six sacks of salt for one chest of silk. The buyer swore it was moon-white. It was off-white, but soft."}
{"text":"Reminder: copper ingots carry better than coins in the dunes. Coins clink. Raiders listen."}

minecraft:written_book_content.author: Jalen
pages: {"text":"Three wagons lost a wheel on day two. Replaced with acacia and a prayer."}
{"text":"Scorpions at camp, but the camels held steady. Found a shrine of bleached stone and left a coin."}

minecraft:written_book_content.author: Bazaar Clerk
pages: {"text":"No sales during the bell. No shouting over the spice guild. Keep blades sheathed after dusk."}
{"text":"If a trade is disputed, walk to the blue tent. Do not argue in the sand."}

minecraft:written_book_content.author: Old Nura
pages: {"text":"There is a maze out in the deep desert. Stone walls, no shade, a treasure at its heart if the stories are true."}
{"text":"The sand keeps its own secrets. If you go, mark your way. If you return, bring water for the next fool."}

minecraft:written_book_content.author: Safa
pages: {"text":"Two crates of glass beads vanished between the north gate and stall 14. Guards blame wind. Wind does not lock latches."}
{"text":"If found, return for double pay. If not found, I will find you."}

minecraft:written_book_content.author: Tamar
pages: {"text":"Walk by the sun when it kisses the far dune. The stone finger points west. The dry well is your last shade."}
{"text":"If the wind buries the markers, trust the stars and the taste of the air. It always turns iron before a storm."}
